title: KB Decay Applied
description: Emitted by `kb decay` when time-based confidence decay is applied to vault entries. Skipped in --dry-run mode. Enables dashboards to track vault health over time. UNCONSUMED (2026-07 zombie-event audit): kb publishes this event but no consumer (dashboard or otherwise) was found anywhere in hearth, tengine, or tachyonac-engine — currently write-only telemetry. Not removed (cheap, harmless bus write that may become useful later); flagged so the registry stops implying something reads it today. See nervous-bus schemas/CHANNELS.md for current status.

count.description: Number of entries whose confidence was reduced

project.description: Project filter applied, or null for all projects

dry_run.description: Always false when this event fires; dry-run runs do not emit
